BMRT's technology can detect infected poultry, halting mass culling in bird flu crisis. (Characters: 83)
news.summary: In Stuart, Florida, on March 13, 2025, BMRT has unveiled a groundbreaking technology that can immediately identify infected poultry, halting the unnecessary slaughter of healthy birds. This innovation comes amid a surge in mass chicken culling because of avian influenza. The new technology is poised to make a significant impact by quickly detecting infected birds, potentially saving countless healthy animals from being culled.

news.headline: G-7 may not issue joint statement as US objections persist.
Board of Directors approves draft financial statement for 2024. Reply Group sees an 8.4% increase in turnover to €2.3 billion. EBITDA at €410.6 million.
news.summary: Turin, Italy - The Board of Directors of Reply S.p.A. [MTA, STAR: REY] has given approval to the draft financial statement for the year 2024. The financial statement is slated for review and approval by the Shareholders’ Meeting, set to take place in Turin on 23 April 2025 in a single call. The Reply Group concluded 2024 with a consolidated turnover of €2,295.9 million, showcasing an 8.4% rise from the previous year's €2,118.0 million. Positive trends are seen across all key indicators during this period. The consolidated EBITDA stood at €410.6 million, reflecting an incre...

news.headline: Trump family in talks to acquire stake in Binance.US as founder Changpeng Zhao seeks pardon. Zhao, majority shareholder, looking to bring Binance back to US market after facing $4.3B fine and operating without fixed base.
news.summary: Members of President Donald Trump's relatives are in talks to obtain a financial stake in Binance.US, the U.S. division of the leading cryptocurrency exchange globally. This development aligns with efforts by Binance founder Changpeng Zhao, who served a four-month prison term following a 2023 admission of guilt for anti-money-laundering breaches, to seek a pardon from the Trump administration, per The Wall Street Journal. Zhao, still the primary shareholder, began negotiations with Trump associates last year in a bid to reestablish the company in the U.S. market. Binance, which confronted a $4.3 billion penalty and has been operating without a fixed base since its startup in Shanghai in 2017, is the subject of these discussions. The exact extent of the Trump family's investment is uncertain, with possibilities including a direct financial commitment or incorporation through World Liberty Financial, a Trump-supported cryptocurrency enterprise that was introduced... (Continued on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: CPSC cautions against using O3waterworks spray bottles due to fire hazard. Model SB100 HD affected; manufactured by Enozo Technologies Inc.
news.summary: The U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) has issued a warning to consumers on March 13, 2025, advising them to discontinue the use of O3waterworks' Sanitizing Home Enhanced Oxygen Spray Bottles Home Version with model number SB100 HD. This is due to a fire hazard associated with the product. This alert emphasizes the urgency of ceasing the use of the mentioned product to prevent potential risks.

news.headline: Global condom market expected to reach $26.3 billion by 2035 with 5.8% CAGR growth. Demand for ultra-thin, textured, flavored condoms rising due to customer needs for comfort and pleasure. Smart condoms with performance-tracking capabilities may gain popularity amongst tech-savvy consumers.
news.summary: The desire for increased comfort and enjoyment among customers is expected to drive a rise in demand for ultra-thin, textured, and flavored condoms. There is also a potential increase in popularity for smart condoms with performance-tracking features, particularly among tech-savvy consumers. This trend is predicted to continue in the coming years.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for investors of Neumora Therapeutics. Losses? Contact James Wilson.
news.summary: Seeking representation for losses in Neumora? Contact James Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP. If you bought Neumora securities tied to the registration statement and suffered losses, reach out to discuss your options.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: I wouldn't hesitate to increase sanctions on Russia.
WalletConnect's Pedro Gomes launches WCT token; cites 'Token-Market Fit' for timing. Discussed Smart Sessions and WalletConnect Foundation.
news.summary: Pedro Gomes from WalletConnect recently discussed Smart Sessions, the creation of the WalletConnect Foundation, and the WCT token in an interview with Decrypt. The Foundation aims to further the adoption of decentralized finance (DeFi) and blockchain technology, with a focus on enhancing connectivity and interoperability. The WCT token is a key aspect of this initiative, serving as a utility token for users within the WalletConnect ecosystem. Gomes emphasized the importance of these developments in driving innovation and collaboration within the cryptocurrency space.

news.headline: Beko wins 6 iF DESIGN AWARDS in 2025 across Product, UX, and Communication categories, showcasing innovative design.
news.summary: Beko has been recognized for excellence at the iF DESIGN AWARDS 2025, securing a total of six awards for its Whirlpool, Grundig, and Indesit brands. These accolades span across categories such as Product, UX, and Communication, highlighting the brand's commitment to innovative and sustainable design. The awards were received in Istanbul on March 13, 2025. Beko's impressive performance reinforces its position as a leader in the industry, with a strong focus on delivering cutting-edge and environmentally conscious products.

news.headline: European Commission will propose, by June 2025, a defence omnibus simplification regulation - Draft White Paper on Defence.
Global AI in Video Surveillance market expected to reach $12.46 Bn by 2030 dominated by key players like Hikvision and Dahua.
news.summary: In Dublin, the market for AI in video surveillance is estimated to have a value of USD 3.90 billion in 2024. It is anticipated to experience significant growth and reach a value of USD 12.46 billion by 2030, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of x%. The report details that the market includes various offerings such as AI cameras, video management systems, and video analytics. Deployment options range from cloud-based to edge-based, while technologies utilized encompass machine learning, deep learning, GenAI, computer vision, and natural language processing.

news.headline: Inventor creates new arm rest accessory, "THE CAR - COMFORTABLE ARM REST," to provide comfort and support for drivers.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from Cincinnati, Ohio shared his inspiration for creating a new vehicle accessory. The inventor aimed to enhance driver comfort and support during travel, leading to the invention of THE CAR - COMFORTABLE ARM REST. This innovative armrest design caters to the needs of drivers by providing proper comfort and support for their arms. It aims to improve the driving experience by ensuring that drivers can...

news.headline: Scientific Games retains World Lottery Association re-certification for responsible gaming, focuses on healthy play globally.
news.summary: Atlanta, March 13, 2025 - Scientific Games reaffirms its commitment to promoting responsible gaming practices globally, with its operations and technology centering around promoting healthy play. The company has once again been re-certified for the World Lottery Association's Responsible Gaming Framework, maintaining its position as a leader in this field. This recognition underscores Scientific Games' dedication to providing a safe and enjoyable gaming experience for its customers worldwide.

news.headline: CPSC announces Lithium-Ion battery recall for Sublue Mix underwater scooters due to fire hazard. View recalls at www.cpsc.gov.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Washington DC, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) released information about recalls conducted in collaboration with certain companies. The recalls include Sublue lithium-ion batteries intended for Sublue Mix underwater scooters due to a fire hazard. For more details on the recalled products, individuals can visit www.cpsc.gov.

US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We are hoping to get to a tax bill in the coming weeks.
Coop Pank AS issued 250 mln euros of 4-year covered bonds to diversify funding structure. Bonds listed on Irish Stock Exchange with (P)Aa2 rating by Moody's.
news.summary: Today, on March 13th, 2025, Coop Pank AS successfully closed its first issuance of 250 million euros in 4-year covered bonds. This issuance is part of their EUR 750 million Covered Bond Programme, aiming to enhance the bank's funding diversity. The bonds will be traded on the Irish Stock Exchange. Moody’s Investors Service Ltd has granted the covered bonds a credit rating of (P)Aa2.

news.headline: European Commission will propose measures to deepen the single market for defence, notably through greater clarity on procurement and regulatory simplification and harmonisation - Draft White Paper on Defence.
European Commission to invite EU countries to swiftly agree' on most pressing critical defence capability areas to launch large-scale, pan-European flagship projects - Draft White Paper on Defence.

AI in Computer Vision market projected to reach USD 63.48 billion by 2030 from USD 23.42 billion in 2025, with expected CAGR.
news.summary: Dublin, Ireland - The market for AI in computer vision is rapidly expanding, as highlighted in a recent report. This market, which includes offerings such as cameras, frame grabbers, optics, LED lighting, CPUs, GPUs, ASICs, FPGAs, AI vision software, and AI platforms, is projected to see substantial growth. The global AI in computer vision market is anticipated to reach USD 63.48 billion by 2030, a significant increase from USD 23.42 billion in 2025. This growth signifies a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of [specific number]%. The report providing these insights can be found on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Viatris investors who suffered significant losses. Contact for legal options.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a partner specializing in securities litigation at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is reaching out to investors who have experienced substantial losses in Viatris. If you have incurred significant losses in Viatris stock or options, Wilson urges you to contact him directly to explore potential courses of action.

news.headline: PranaX Corporation licenses exosome technology from MD Anderson Cancer Center to develop exosomes for commercial use.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, PranaX Corporation, a regenerative medicine biotechnology company, revealed the acquisition of exosome technology from The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center. This move aims to advance the development of exosomes for commercial applications. The company's website is www.pranax.com.

news.headline: Sisram Medical will reveal FY 2024 financial results on March 19 and host a conference call on March 20 at 8:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Mark your calendars for the conference call on March 20, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Sisram Medical Ltd ("Sisram"), listed as 1696.HK, will hold the call in Hong Kong. The company, along with its subsidiaries, is a global consumer wellness group.
